query:
SELECT p.id, p.status, LEFT(p.caption,80) as caption_preview, m.mediaUrl, m.mediaType 
FROM posts p 
LEFT JOIN post_media m ON m.postId = p.id 
WHERE DATE(p.createdAt) = CURDATE() 
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3F5sJN7FajWtXbb.root --database 3LYkMyiPgdB2gzxf44Hk3M --execute SELECT p.id, p.status, LEFT(p.caption,80) as caption_preview, m.mediaUrl, m.mediaType 
FROM posts p 
LEFT JOIN post_media m ON m.postId = p.id 
WHERE DATE(p.createdAt) = CURDATE() 
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
